rationale: Educ. Code §30.025 governs funding sources for the School for the Blind and Visually Impaired. It references the available school fund but does not regulate homestead exemptions or school finance formulas that compensate for them. No direct conflict with Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: the school's share of the available school fund and payments to compensate for payments no longer made from the available school fund as provided by Section 30.003(f).
_note: Indirect fiscal linkage via available school fund, but no operative conflict. School finance formula statutes (e.g., Educ. Code Ch. 42) would be the relevant conflict surface for homestead exemption changes.
